name: Kate Markowitz
abstract: Catherine Judith Markowitz (born 28 April 1956) is an American singer-songwriter known as a backup singer who has recorded and performed with a number of singers, most notably James Taylor but also Willy DeVille, Shawn Colvin, Mylène Farmer, Don Henley, Billy Joel, k.d. lang, Lyle Lovett, Graham Nash, Randy Newman, Warren Zevon, Joe Pizz…

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: I got to sing with James Taylor’s back-up singers — Kate Markowitz and Arnold McCuller.
about_quotes.doc_title: Catherine Russell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, October 26, 2018
